title: Box Buddies Boxibos Pets - Pack of 12 Mini Box Animals - Paper Craft for Kids, Party Bag Fillers, Pocket Money Toys
features: A simple and fun to build collection of mini box pet characters
12 fun and colourful animal paper toy characters in each pack including cats, dogs, bunnies and birds
Boxibos are perfect as unique eco party bag fillers, gifts, prizes or rewards for children to make
Easy and fun to build into a cute papercraft animal box toy with no need for cutting or sticking
Constructed mini box characters stand around 50mm tall
description: A collection of 12 easy to build papercraft box pets. The Boxibos Pets set includes cats, dogs, bunnies and birds. Box Buddies Pets make fun and unique rewards, place settings and party bag fillers for a kids pet or animal themed party. Boxibos also make great stocking fillers. No cutting or sticking is needed to build Boxibos. Each pre-cut card builds into a sturdy box toy - just remove the tear-off tag, then fold and connect the simple tab and slot and pop out the arms and lid details. Once constructed, each box character's dimensions are 48mm(H) X 35mm (W) X 30mm(D) and the finished pet character stands approx. 50mm tall when made. The flat cards measure 130mm x 148mm. All Box Buddies products are sustainably designed and printed in the UK. Boxibos are plastic-free, 100% recyclable and printed with eco inks.
